com.mentor.chs.plugin.useraccess

Interface IXUserAccessibilityResult<O extends IXObject>


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXUserAccessibilityResult<O extends IXObject>
    Collection of these objects would be filled in by Capital and passed to IXUserAccessibilityEvaluator plugin. Plugin needs to check the accessibility of individual objects from the collection and set its accessibility level into the objects which will be then used by Capital to restrict its access to current user. Currently Capital supports IXProject and IXDesign
    See Also:
    UserAccessibility, IXUserAccessibilityEvaluation

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      UserAccessibility getAccessibility()
      This is used by capital to determine the accessibility of the object
      java.lang.String getMessage()
      This returns any message filter has set to describe the access level of the object or any other error message
      O getObject()
      Filter should decide the accessibility (read/write/no access) of this object to the current user
      void setAccessibility(UserAccessibility accessibility)
      Filter needs to set the accessibility of the object using this API.
      void setMessage(java.lang.String message)
      This is used by filter to set any message related to access level or any other error message

    • Method Detail

      • getObject

        O getObject()
        Filter should decide the accessibility (read/write/no access) of this object to the current user
        Returns:
        O returns the IXObject set by Capital

      • getAccessibility

        UserAccessibility getAccessibility()
        This is used by capital to determine the accessibility of the object
        Returns:
        UserAccessibility returns the user accessibility of the current object returned by getObject()

      • setAccessibility

        void setAccessibility(UserAccessibility accessibility)
        Filter needs to set the accessibility of the object using this API. It will be in turn used by Capital to restrict access of the object to the Capital user.

      • getMessage

        java.lang.String getMessage()
        This returns any message filter has set to describe the access level of the object or any other error message
        Returns:
        returns any message set by the filter

      • setMessage

        void setMessage(java.lang.String message)
        This is used by filter to set any message related to access level or any other error message
        Parameters:
        message - any message filter wants to return back to capital
